name: Carmelitas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix butter, sugar, eggs, chocolate, milk, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients to the mixture, stirring constantly to form a soft dough.
3. Chill the dough for 1 to 2 hours.
4. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Mold the chilled dough around caramel halves or cherries and place them on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake for about 7 minutes, or until set. Allow to cool completely.
7. Frost the cooled cookies by blending powdered sugar, light corn syrup, premelted chocolate, and hot water in a small bowl until smooth. Dip each cooled cookie into the frosting, allowing it to dry before serving.
Frosting:
1. In a small bowl, blend all frosting ingredients together until smooth.
2. Dip each cooled caramelita cookie into the frosting, ensuring it is evenly coated. Allow the frosting to set before enjoying.
